response.content: {"description":"A large-diaphragm condenser studio microphone with a cylindrical champagne/satin-nickel body. The upper capsule section features a fine woven metal mesh grille in a darker silver tone. The body bears an engraved circular logo and the text 'PHANTOM classic' with serial number 'Nr. 1307' near the base. The microphone is mounted in a silver elastic shock-mount cradle with a black pop filter (circular, dual-layer mesh in a black plastic ring) attached via a gooseneck arm. The overall orientation is vertical, capsule facing upward-forward.","consistencyTag":"champagne-condenser-studio-microphone","suggestedToken":"PHANTOM_CLASSIC_MIC"}
